data.name: Short NTR Stories
data.detailed_description:
What to expect?

"Short NTR Stories" is a collection of independent, bite-sized tales exploring the netorare (NTR) genre. As you finish a story it unlocks another one. Each story stands on its own, featuring different characters, scenarios, and relationships, all tied together by the common theme of NTR—where a character's partner is taken by another, exploring emotional and physical challenges in various situations. With a game resolution of 1920x1080, each scene is carefully crafted. The game also includes an in-game gallery, allowing you to revisit the stories as you explore this provocative and complex fetish.

Animated

The game features high-quality animations designed to bring each story to life. With smooth transitions and attention to detail, the animations make every moment more immersive and impactful.

Stories

A strange tradition

In a small village, newlyweds Fatima and Arjun are expected to follow a traditional but uncomfortable practice where Arjun’s uncle, Anand, guides them on their wedding night. While Arjun loves and trusts his uncle, Fatima sees Anand’s true, harmful nature. She struggles with how to protect their marriage and reveal Anand’s bad behavior without hurting Arjun.

Homewrecked

Daniel, a weak young man, lives with his wife Emily and his strict mother Helen. But their quiet home unravels when Jake—a dominant bully from Daniel’s job and Emily’s ex-lover—returns to claim what he believes is his. As Daniel stays silent in fear, Jake seduces Emily again, then corrupts Helen too.

Domination game

Claire discovers her husband Ethan enjoys being submissive in bed. To surprise him, she secretly trains under Marcus, a seductive BDSM master. But the lessons turn dark as Claire falls under Marcus’s control, forgetting the man she was trying to please.

The Visit

Banu’s quiet visit to the village to settle her aunt’s land dispute turns dangerously personal when she stays at her brother-in-law Tayfun’s farm. Old tension and forbidden attraction ignite between the city wife and the rugged village man. As the week unfolds, restraint begins to crack under the weight of their growing desire.

data.short_description: This is a collection of NTR (Netorare) stories. Each story is unique, exploring themes of love, cheating, betrayal, corruption, mind break, mind control and desire.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2014 or newer Intel Core i5 / AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2016 or newer Intel / AMD chipset
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia or ATi GPU with 2GB+ Memory
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS: Mac OS X 10.8+
  • 處理器: Processor: 2014 or newer Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated chipset
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS, or recent 64 bit Linux release
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD 64-bit capable processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated chipset
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
